title: Bonn Climate Talks 2026: From Fossil Fuels to Trade, Key Issues to Watch at SB64
description: Climate negotiators from around the world will gather in Bonn from June 8 to 18 for the 64th sessions of the UN Framework Convention on Climate Change’s subsidiary bodies (SB64), the first major round of negotiations since COP30 in Belém. Often viewed as a technical bridge between annual climate summits, this year’s Bonn talks are [...] The post Bonn Climate Talks 2026: From Fossil Fuels to Trade, Key Issues to Watch at SB64 appeared first on ANC .

title: Fossil reveals feathered gliding dinosaur that may have hunted birds 120 million years ago
description: A newly discovered feathered dinosaur fossil in China, named Jianchangmaensis, reveals a previously unknown species of Microraptor. This bird-like dinosaur, about the size of a barn owl, likely glided through trees and may have hunted ancient birds, expanding our understanding of early avian evolution and the diversity of these gliding dinosaurs.

title: 4 Ancient Indian Monuments That Are Over 500 Years Old
description: India’s rich heritage comes alive through its ancient monuments. From the majestic ruins of Hampi and the legendary Chittorgarh Fort to the sacred Meenakshi Amman Temple and the grand Agra Fort, these historic landmarks have stood for centuries. Each offers a fascinating glimpse into India’s architectural brilliance, cultural traditions, and the remarkable stories that shaped the nation.

title: Ancient village in SW China's Yunnan thrives through pottery
description: Inside a Qing Dynasty (1644-1911) kiln, rows of clay vessels gradually take shape amid a roaring fir
